query:
INSERT INTO rebalance_actions
                (intent_id, node_id, asset, source_channel, sink_channel,
                 amount, benefit_bp, state, mode, quoted_fee,
                 policy_snapshot, created_at_ms, updated_at_ms)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5,
                    $6::text::numeric, $7, $8, $9, $10::text::numeric,
                    $11, $12, $13)
